review_task: v0.14-002 Prism round 3 blocker remediation re-review
binding_check: reviewer execution digest and candidate Prism render/bundle identities are different; Runtime must bind both into the task and persisted result

failure_semantics: Missing, equal, unknown or stale identities reject the review result. Candidate output cannot establish trust or activate itself.
